shelling.title: Shelling
steps: Lie on the ground, cover your head with your hands
Stay away from windows and glass doors

collapse.title: Collapse / Building destruction
steps: Cover your face with your hands, protect your head

crowd.title: Panic / Crowd
steps: Keep your hands in front of your chest
Move to the edge of the crowd

no_water.title: No water / food
steps: Purify water by boiling or tablets
